info.title: CentralNuGetUpdater
info.description:
A console application that helps you manage and update NuGet packages in .NET projects using Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props). Supports conditional packages with framework-specific conditions,
            GlobalPackageReference items for analyzers and tools, and provides intelligent framework-aware version updates. Uses the same credential providers as 'dotnet restore' for seamless authentication with private feeds.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Central NuGet Package Updater - Check and update packages in Directory.Packages.props

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate a solution from regular PackageReference to Central Package Management
